gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands with a welcoming smile, gestures widely with both arms toward the colorful objects on the screen, inviting attention.
a person leans slightly forward, tilting their head and using one hand to mimic counting up, as if highlighting the groups.
a tutor points upward with both hands, tracing the lines of the rows and columns formed by the arranged objects in an array.
a person steps to the side, using one hand to gesture along the rows as they explain how multiplication relates to counting.
a tutor claps their hands together lightly, then extends arms forward enthusiastically, inviting everyone to join in counting groups.
a person holds up four fingers on one hand and then two fingers on the other, looking around as if engaging the learners in the question.
a tutor stands tall, spreading arms out to the sides, symbolizing the concept of multiplication as counting groups of objects learned today.
a person gently taps the side of their head with a finger, then makes a sweeping gesture in front as they emphasize using arrays for understanding.
